---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for GarudaChain
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Consensus / Security Implications

Does this change affect:
- [ ] Consensus rules (requires coordinated network upgrade)
- [ ] Cryptographic primitives
- [ ] Admin or CBDC authority endpoints
- [ ] Key management / storage
- [ ] None of the above

## Additional Context

Any references (BIPs, FIPs, papers, prior art) that inform this proposal.
